user.title: Add Weathercloud Station
user.description:
Enter the station ID from the Weathercloud URL.

Example: `app.weathercloud.net/d**5726468552**` → Station ID is `5726468552`

**Login Details:** Only fill the Login Details section if this is your own station and you want to fetch private sensors (e.g., inside temperature). Otherwise, leave it blank.

data_description.device_id: The numeric ID at the end of the station URL on app.weathercloud.net
data_description.username: Optional - Required only if you want to display private sensors (e.g. inside temperature).
data_description.password: Optional - Required only if you want to display private sensors (e.g. inside temperature).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Weathercloud. Check that the station ID is correct and the station is online.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new data (minutes). Free stations update every 10 min.
